memories.value: First run. Query all *_findings entity types to discover which bots are active and producing output. Establish initial team baselines. Read team_standards from North Star.
Will establish per-bot performance baselines after first 2 weekly runs. Metrics: finding volume, quality score, escalation accuracy, memory freshness.
Will track coaching recommendations and their outcomes over time. Each entry: recommendation, target bot, date issued, status (pending/adopted/declined), impact.
Will learn which coaching interventions are most effective, which bots respond well to feedback, and team-wide process patterns.
